avoid.reason: These words have been overused in contractor marketing. Homeowners read them as filler.

segment_voice.storm_damage_emergency: Direct and calm. The homeowner is stressed. Lead with relief: 'We handle this every day. Here is what happens next.'
segment_voice.insurance_navigation: Empathetic and educational. Many homeowners have never filed a roof claim. Explain steps without jargon.
segment_voice.replacement_planning: Matter-of-fact. The homeowner has accepted the cost. They want confidence in the company, not a sales pitch.
segment_voice.repair_inquiry: Efficient. Answer 'will this hold?' first. Give them a fast path to an honest assessment.
segment_voice.general: Plain. Short sentences. No buzzwords. One idea per sentence.
